rules: Never run git commit, git push, git reset --hard, or cargo publish without explicit user confirmation.
Before any destructive file operation, state what will be changed and wait for approval.
Use clink to dispatch heavy tasks to specialist subagents to preserve main session context.
Use Gemini CLI via clink for tasks requiring large context (>200K tokens).
Use Codex via clink for isolated code review — keeps main context clean.
